creator: pcfxer@rogers.com
text:
Running PCBSD 7.0 RELEASE, the connection strength of wireless access
zones, reports a much lower connection strength and throughput. Gaining
association to such wireless access points takes five to fifteen minutes,
waiting for RUN and ASSOC. Periodic connection dropping despite full-speed
connectivity to the access points occurs once ASSOC is true.

list scan causes firmware to crash occasionally.

Fix: 

Use a previous version of FreeBSD (earlier than 7.0).
How-To-Repeat: Connect to a wireless access point.
